heading: Penalty
label: 4102 Penalty
text: Whoever, without proper authority, flies from any building, aircraft, motorboat, yacht, or other vessel, any flag or pennant or displays any identifying insignia or wears any uniform or insignia of the Reserve or the Auxiliary shall be fined not more than $500.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 352 (, title III, § 302, ; , ).Feb. 19, 1941, ch. 855 Stat. 13Sept. 30, 1944, ch. 453, § 958 Stat. 761Said section has been divided.
